app.name: Smart Sim DZ
app.subtitle: Connect. Translate. Explore safely.
app.noResults: No results — try widening your search

landing.heroSub: A prepaid SIM that speaks your language. Contextual translation, local services, and safety — all in one.
landing.why1: Not machine output — what people actually say here, with cultural notes.
landing.why2: Opt-in location sharing and SOS with tourist police coordination.
landing.why3: Hotels, restaurants, tours — book directly with verified partners.
landing.trilingualNote: Available in English, French, and Arabic

auth.consentLater: Permissions will be requested when needed, not here.

sim.iccidPlaceholder: Enter the 19-digit number on your SIM card
sim.esimNote: Your phone's settings app must scan this QR code to install the eSIM profile. A browser cannot provision an eSIM — this is an operating system function.
sim.scanFallback: Camera not available. Use manual entry instead.

translator.title: Contextual Translator
translator.subtitle: What people actually say here
translator.contextualSub: What a person says in this context
translator.voiceNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser. Use text input instead.

phrasebook.title: Offline Phrasebook
phrasebook.subtitle: Available without internet
phrasebook.emergencyNote: Keep these accessible at all times

safety.title: Safety
safety.consentPurpose: Purpose: To enable emergency assistance if you activate the SOS signal.
safety.consentRetention: Retention: Location data is stored for 72 hours after your trip ends, then automatically deleted.
safety.consentVisibility: Visible to: Authorised tourist-police officers only, and only during an active SOS event or with a documented authorisation reference.
safety.browserLimit: Location is shared only while this app is open.
safety.sosSentSub: Authorities have been notified. Stay where you are.
safety.auditLogEmpty: No one has accessed your location

services.title: Services
services.bookingSub: This is a demo booking — no real payment was made.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.paymentDisabled: Payment processing is disabled in this prototype

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.iosNote: On iOS, web push notifications require the app to be installed to the home screen.

authority.title: Authority Console
authority.subtitle: Active SOS signals only
authority.noSignalsSub: Only active emergency signals appear here. There is no map of all tourists.
authority.authRefNote: This access will be logged in the tourist's audit trail

admin.title: Admin Back-Office
admin.mauProjection: 10,000 — projection, sourced from project market study
admin.revenueProjection: ~480M DZD — projection, against a serviceable market near 4.8Bn DZD
admin.projectionSource: Source: Smart Sim DZ project market study
